nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent task executor without human input
nodes.grounding_span: Working with the AI it is helpful to draw on their knowledge and research to shift standard ideas and questions

nodes.label: Fluid, mood-driven AI interaction style
nodes.grounding_span: Its really more about my mood, I find that I work different ways based upon how I'm feeling

nodes.label: AI as accountability and follow-up assistant
nodes.grounding_span: Peer review is an essential part of academics and if AI systems are going to grow to be researchers they will need to have an awareness of their own fallibility

nodes.label: AI use in education
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human roles and job security
nodes.grounding_span: the benefits are too vast to be ignored and the times too important to turn away from what can really create the possibility of an educational equality

nodes.label: AI for polished output and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it was nice doing the clean typesetting

nodes.label: Human irreplaceability through unique experience and perspective
nodes.grounding_span: My skills are my ideas that are formed from my unique experience and perspective and no one can take that

nodes.label: Student-centered education
nodes.grounding_span: Students want more than anything to be heard and made to feel like their ideas are worthwhile

nodes.label: Intellectual honesty and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: Trusted peers and friends keep you honest and keep your head on straight and feet on the ground

nodes.label: Equity and student support
nodes.grounding_span: create the possibility of an educational equality where everyone can have access to top notch tutoring

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it was nice doing the clean typesetting

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: My skills are my ideas that are formed from my unique experience and perspective

nodes.label: Frustration with AI output quality
nodes.grounding_span: The first time we completed a problem set, coded up the Latex and produced the neat PDF was very satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: There has definitely been frustration where I could not get the formatting or sequencing correct

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI in education
nodes.grounding_span: the benefits are too vast to be ignored and the times too important to turn away

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: My skills are my ideas that are formed from my unique experience and perspective and no one can take that

nodes.label: Mood-dependent task delegation
nodes.grounding_span: Its really more about my mood, I find that I work different ways based upon how I'm feeling

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: I do not always know the direction at first and sometimes a conversation will help
